ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster (e.g., Ahmadabad Rice Mills) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector under which the cluster operates (e.g., Food Products) */,
  "district" TEXT /* District where the cluster is located */,
  "product" TEXT /* Product associated with the cluster */,
  "suitable_schemes" TEXT /* Government schemes suitable for the cluster */,
  "number_of_msm_es" INTEGER /* Approximate number of MSMEs in the cluster */,
  "cluster_description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the cluster was established */,
  "cluster_lead" TEXT /* Name of the cluster lead */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Food Products) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product (e.g., Rice Mills) */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cluster producing this product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "production_capacity" INTEGER /* Production capacity of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schemes" (
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheme */,
  "scheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the scheme (e.g., Common Facility Center) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scheme's objectives and benefits */,
  "scheme_type" TEXT /* Type of the scheme (e.g., funding, training) */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the scheme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cluster_schemes" (
  "cluster_scheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cluster-scheme association */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Cluster identifier */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Scheme identifier */,
  "implementation_status" TEXT /* Status of scheme implementation in the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_scheme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_schemes_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_schemes_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "msme_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MSME owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the owner */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cluster the MSME belongs to */,
  "msme_name" TEXT /* Name of the MSME */,
  "msme_description" TEXT /* Description of the MSME */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_msme_owners_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "msme_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_msme_access_logs_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES msme_owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedbacks" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MSME owner providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the owner (1-5 scale) */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date of feedback submission */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of feedback (e.g., scheme, cluster) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedbacks_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES msme_owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data or summary contained in the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_category" TEXT /* Category of the report (e.g., cluster, scheme) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Administrator, MSME Owner) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "role_assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MSME owner being assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES msme_owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cluster_meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster the meeting belongs to */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "meeting_description" TEXT /* Description of the meeting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_meetings_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meeting the attendee belongs to */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MSME owner attending the meeting */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., present, absent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_attendees_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES cluster_meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_attendees_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES msme_owners ("owner_id")
)
